---
title: Welcome
format: html
date: last-modified
---
Welcome to the Git book for _Flyway Assessment of Offshore Wind Farm Impacts on Migratory Fishes_, a project funded by the [Responsible Offshore Science Alliance](https://www.rosascience.org).

::: {.callout-warning}
This book is undergoing rapid development and is not peer reviewed. Everything you read should be considered preliminary and subject to substantial change.
:::

![](fact_sheet.jpg)
